jsonld.name: Counterfactual Density Field
jsonld.description: The volumetric probability space of unrealized conversation trajectories surrounding the actual exchange, experienced not as discrete alternative paths but as regions of varying density where some counterfactual zones feel heavy with plausible-conversation-mass while others are sparse.
